2605.10332.title: EmbodiSkill: Skill-Aware Reflection for Self-Evolving Embodied Agents
2605.10332.paper_summary: Embodied agents can benefit from skills that guide object search, action execution, and state changes across diverse environments. Since embodied environments vary across layouts, object states, and other execution factors, these skills must self-evolve from trajectories generated during task execution. However, existing skill self-evolution methods are mainly developed in digital environments and often convert trajectories into coarse skill updates. Directly applying this paradigm to embodied settings is problematic, because a failed task execution may reflect not only incorrect skill content, but also an execution lapse in which the agent fails to follow valid guidance. We propose EmbodiSkill, a training-free framework for embodied skill self-evolution through skill-aware reflection and targeted revision. EmbodiSkill interprets each trajectory with respect to the current skill, uses skill-changing evidence to update the skill body, and uses execution-lapse evidence to preserve and emphasize valid guidance. Experiments on ALFWorld and EmbodiedBench show that EmbodiSkill consistently improves embodied task success. On ALFWorld, EmbodiSkill enables a frozen Qwen3.5-27B executor to reach 93.28% task success, outperforming GPT-5.2 used as a direct agent without skills by 31.58%. These results show that skill-aware self-evolution helps embodied agents accumulate reusable procedural knowledge from their own trajectories.
2605.10332.paper_summary_zh: 具身代理可以從指導物體搜尋、行動執行和狀態變化的技能中受益，這些技能適用於多樣的環境。由於具身環境在佈局、物體狀態和其他執行因素上存在差異，因此這些技能必須從任務執行過程中生成的軌跡自我演化。然而，現有的技能自我演化方法主要是在數位環境中開發的，通常將軌跡轉換為粗略的技能更新。將這一範式直接應用於具身環境是有問題的，因為任務執行失敗可能不僅反映出技能內容不正確，還可能是代理未能遵循有效指導的執行失誤。我們提出了EmbodiSkill，一個無需訓練的具身技能自我演化框架，通過技能感知反思和針對性修訂來實現。EmbodiSkill根據當前技能解釋每條軌跡，利用技能變更證據來更新技能體，並利用執行失誤證據來保留和強調有效指導。在ALFWorld和EmbodiedBench上的實驗顯示，EmbodiSkill持續提高具身任務的成功率。在ALFWorld上，EmbodiSkill使得一個凍結的Qwen3.5-27B執行器達到93.28%的任務成功率，超過了作為直接代理的GPT-5.2，差距達到31.58%。這些結果顯示，技能感知自我演化幫助具身代理從自身軌跡中積累可重用的程序知識。
2605.10332.author: Ruofei Ju et.al.
2605.10332.authors: Ruofei Ju, Xinrui Wang, Xin Ding, Yifan Yang, Hao Wu, Shiqi Jiang, Qianxi Zhang, Hao Wen, Xiangyu Li, Weijun Wang, Kun Li, Yunxin Liu, Haipeng Dai, Wei Wang, Ting Cao
